Class StockItem

java.lang.Object
StockItem
public class StockItem extends Object
Stores data meant to represent an inventory item's following traits
  • Item Id
  • Item name
  • Stock Quantintyt
  • Current Active status

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description

    Default Constructor

    Represents a row in the Inventory Table

  • Constructor Details

    • StockItem

      public StockItem()
      Default Constructor

    • StockItem

      public StockItem(String itemName, int stockQuantity, String status)
      Represents a row in the Inventory Table
      Parameters:
      itemName - item_name column object
      stockQuantity - stock_quantity
      status - status column object

  • Method Details

    • getStockItemId

      public int getStockItemId()
      Retrieve unique item identifier
      Returns:
      item_id in the form of an integer

    • setStockItemId

      public void setStockItemId(int stockItemId)
      Change the unique identifier of the object
      Parameters:
      stockItemId - Unique identifier that the object will receive

    • getItemName

      public String getItemName()
      Receive the name of the item
      Returns:
      String object containing item name

    • setItemName

      public void setItemName(String itemName)
      Change the name of the item
      Parameters:
      itemName - New name of the item in the form of a string object

    • getStockQuantity

      public int getStockQuantity()
      Retrieve the stock_quantity value of the item/row
      Returns:
      Stock_Quantity value in the form of an integer

    • setStockQuantity

      public void setStockQuantity(int stockQuantity)
      Change the stock quantity to the input value
      Parameters:
      stockQuantity - New Quantity in the form of an integer

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Manually set the status of an item through a string object
      Parameters:
      status - String Object stating status. Reccomended: 'Active' or 'Inactive'

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns activity in terms of strinf
      Returns:
      Active or Inactive in the form of a string

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Returns activity status in terms of boolean
      Returns:
      Active as true, Inactive as false
